# my-shadow Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2026-04-07

## Active Technologies
- TypeScript 5.9, React 19, React Native 0.81, Expo SDK 54 + Expo Router, `llama.rn`, `react-native-mmkv`, **NativeWind v5 (className-only, no style prop)**, `@rn-primitives` (001-private-shadow-journal)
- Encrypted local storage only (MMKV-backed persistence + local markdown file export) (001-private-shadow-journal)
- **Bun test runner** (native, no Jest) - imports from `"bun:test"` (001-private-shadow-journal)

- TypeScript 5.9, React 19, Expo SDK 54, React Native 0.81 + Expo Router, react-native-rag, @react-native-rag/executorch, react-native-executorch (llama.rn runtime path), @react-native-rag/op-sqlite, nativewind, @rn-primitives UI building blocks (001-private-shadow-journal)

## Project Structure

```text
src/
tests/
```

## Commands

bun test && npm run lint

## Code Style

TypeScript 5.9, React 19, Expo SDK 54, React Native 0.81: Follow standard conventions
